data.title: Zelenskyy Says 'Not Sure' He Did Something Bad After Public Spat With Trump, JD Vance: 'We Have To Be Very Honest And Direct'

data.title: Here's The Mystery Donor Who Donated 10 Tesla Cybertrucks To Las Vegas Metropolitan Police Department: Report

data.title: Trump Cancels News Conference With Zelenskyy After Tense Meet In Oval Office: Report
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has reportedly canceled a planned news conference with Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelensky after a white house meeting between the two turned tense.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Loads Up On Tempus AI, Archer Aviation, But Sells Twist Bioscience: Here Are Key Ark Trades This Friday
data.description: Ark Invest made notable trades on Feb. 28, 2025. They purchased shares in ACHR, RXRX, TEM, and IRDM, while selling shares in TWST, ADYEY, ACCD, and EXAS.

data.title: Trump Says Ukraine's Zelensky Is 'Not Ready For Peace' After Oval Office Spat: 'He Disrespected The United States Of America'
data.description: President Donald Trump voiced his discontent with Ukrainian President Zelenskyy following their meeting at the White House.
